subtitles.original: And what did you like the most?
subtitles.english: And what did you like the most?

subtitles.original: We interrupt your regularly scheduled programming to bring you this breaking news.
subtitles.english: We interrupt your regularly scheduled programming to bring you this breaking news.

subtitles.original: We have just received an exclusive update from Justice, the global guardians of peace.
subtitles.english: We have just received an exclusive update from Justice, the global guardians of peace.

subtitles.original: Rumor has it, a brand new track from the iconic four-piece is about to drop at any second.
subtitles.english: Rumor has it, a brand new track from the iconic four-piece is about to drop at any second.

subtitles.original: I repeat, new music from Justice is imminent.
subtitles.english: I repeat, new music from Justice is imminent.

subtitles.original: We will be right back with the world premiere.
subtitles.english: We will be right back with the world premiere.

subtitles.original: This is Ouro Kronii signing out.
subtitles.english: This is Ouro Kronii signing out.

subtitles.original: If you're feeling trapped, send out a signal right above!
subtitles.english: If you're feeling trapped, send out a signal right above!

subtitles.original: We'll find you, set you free then you can sign up for the club!
subtitles.english: We'll find you, set you free then you can sign up for the club!

subtitles.original: The frig? I'm big! My strong, strong muscle!
subtitles.english: The frig? I'm big! My strong, strong muscle!

subtitles.original: They see me run, it's no miracle!
subtitles.english: They see me run, it's no miracle!

subtitles.original: You can be a SUPER, SUPER GIRL!
subtitles.english: You can be a SUPER, SUPER GIRL!

subtitles.original: Come sing with us, beating villains for fun, love it!
subtitles.english: Come sing with us, beating villains for fun, love it!

subtitles.original: Put on your antennas, get your super girl fit!
subtitles.english: Put on your antennas, get your super girl fit!

subtitles.original: I always want a pizza, stack those fries up to the sky!
subtitles.english: I always want a pizza, stack those fries up to the sky!

subtitles.original: You lot say whatcha think about us hittin' town tonight?
subtitles.english: You lot say whatcha think about us hittin' town tonight?

subtitles.original: So stomp, stomp, stomp your feet to this beat!
subtitles.english: So stomp, stomp, stomp your feet to this beat!

subtitles.original: Cuz we are space, no, no gravity!
subtitles.english: Cuz we are space, no, no gravity!

subtitles.original: You can be a SUPER, SUPER GIRL!
subtitles.english: You can be a SUPER, SUPER GIRL!

subtitles.original: I know you're feeling so super bad!
subtitles.english: I know you're feeling so super bad!

subtitles.original: You don't have depression, you're just super sad!
subtitles.english: You don't have depression, you're just super sad!

subtitles.original: We are change the world, that's hope!
subtitles.english: We are change the world, that's hope!

subtitles.original: If you doubt, hope you explode!
subtitles.english: If you doubt, hope you explode!

subtitles.original: Justice, we are justice, make the baddies go boom!
subtitles.english: Justice, we are justice, make the baddies go boom!

subtitles.original: Come on, come on, baby, rocket ship to the moon!
subtitles.english: Come on, come on, baby, rocket ship to the moon!

subtitles.original: And that was Supernova Super Girl, our brand new song!
subtitles.english: And that was Supernova Super Girl, our brand new song!

subtitles.original: And just like that, our second anniversary stream is coming to an end.
subtitles.english: And just like that, our second anniversary stream is coming to an end.

subtitles.original: So, what did you all think? We'll start with Raora this time.
subtitles.english: So, what did you all think? We'll start with Raora this time.

subtitles.original: Ah, it was really fun! It was amazing, I can't believe it's been already, like, two years!
subtitles.english: Ah, it was really fun! It was amazing, I can't believe it's been already, like, two years!

subtitles.original: I... thank you so much, you guys, as well for being the best... the best companions ever, you know?
subtitles.english: I... thank you so much, you guys, as well for being the best... the best companions ever, you know?

subtitles.original: I'm so grateful to you guys, and thank you to Justice Chat for supporting us since two years now, it's insane. Thank you so much!
subtitles.english: I'm so grateful to you guys, and thank you to Justice Chat for supporting us since two years now, it's insane. Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: Thank you, Justice Chat! Thank you so much!
subtitles.english: Thank you, Justice Chat! Thank you so much!

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Generation Strategy**

Okay, here's the plan. I'm going to generate precise subtitles from this multimodal input, making sure everything is perfectly synced and formatted. The primary source is the audio, it's the ultimate truth. The target language is English – although there are some Japanese words thrown in, I will include translations where it is helpful. Timecodes are crucial, and the format needs to be `MM:SS.mmm`, with no cascading delays or overlaps, especially given the rapid-fire speech. The final output has to be a JSON object inside of the `final_result` tool call containing a list of `subs` with the `s`, `e`, `og`, and `en` fields for each subtitle.

First, I'll go segment by segment and note down the relevant timestamps and transcriptions. So, I have this data mapped out: a TV sound with a jingle, then a conversation between a mother and daughter, a news segment with Ouro Kronii, and finally, the song "SUPERNOVA SUPER GIRL" by Justice. I'll need to pay close attention to the song lyrics, as it seems to be English with interjections and some Japanese. I'll meticulously transcribe the lyrics and match them to the audio, using reference lyrics to ensure accuracy.

I have to follow all the rules: no "cc tags" (brackets) except when the audio itself has them, use direct vocalizations like "Yay!" instead of "[cheering]". There should be no overlaps and I will be aggressive with timing precision.

Now, let's look at the timestamps from the news segment and the song. The end of the second anniversary stream, and the ensuing chat, needs to be included in the transcript as well. I'll check and adjust these timings against the original text again, especially for the song lyrics, since those are the most complex.

Finally, I’ll translate Japanese phrases like "Minna happiness" (everyone's happiness) and "Motto maniac" (More maniac) into English, while including the original if it is useful. I'll also ensure the subtitles are clean, correctly capitalized and punctuated. The timestamps must be perfect.

Now, I'll build the final JSON output with the clean, perfectly synced subtitles. Let's do this carefully and precisely, remembering to double-check everything, to make sure it's accurate and follows all of the instructions. Let's start!
